title: Investigation of clinical characteristics and genome associations in the 'UK Lipoedema' cohort.
author: Grigoriadis D Sackey E Riches K van Zanten M Brice G England R Mills M Dobbins SE Lee LL Lipoedema Consortium Genomics England Research Consortium Jeffery S Dong L Savage DB Mortimer PS Keeley V Pittman A Gordon K Ostergaard P
content: S-EPMC9560129 PMC9560129 Investigation of clinical characteristics and genome associations in the 'UK Lipoedema' cohort. Lipoedema is a chronic adipose tissue disorder mainly affecting women, causing excess subcutaneous fat deposition on the lower limbs with pain and tenderness. There is often
